mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 7% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, prompting risk-off behavior that drives S&P 500 forward returns negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of falling federal funds rates and subdued inflation (CPIAUCSL < 2%) indicates accommodative monetary policy, creating favorable valuation conditions for equities and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to produce positive returns in > 40% of triggered instances, or the interaction term's coefficient is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential construction (HOUST > 600k units) during a monetary tightening cycle signals persistent demand pressures, leading to positive S&P 500 returns as markets price in inflation resilience.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of instances where HOUST exceeds 600k during rate hikes, or the interaction term's IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO > 105) reflects robust supply-side dynamics, reducing recession risks and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The signal fails to produce positive returns in > 30% of cases, or INDPRO's IC drops below 0.04 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in CPIAUCSL below 2% signals deflationary risks, prompting central bank intervention that drives S&P 500 forward returns positive over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL falls below 2%, or the signal's IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls (PAYEMS > 150k) and declining unemployment (UNRATE < 7%) indicates a tightening labor market, driving positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to produce positive returns in > 40% of cases, or the interaction term's coefficient is insignificant (p > 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer demand (RSAFS > 340k) during late-cycle expansion signals sustained economic momentum, generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns are negative in > 35% of instances, or RSAFS's IC falls below 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.
